CREATE TABLE example_strings (id INT, text STRING);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, text STRING);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, 'single character'), (2, 'multi character string');
SELECT id, length_grapheme(text) AS grapheme_count FROM example_strings;
SELECT id, length_grapheme(text) AS grapheme_count FROM example_strings WHERE length_grapheme(text) > 1;
SELECT e.id, length_grapheme(e.text) AS grapheme_count FROM example_strings e JOIN additional_data a ON e.id = a.id;
SELECT id, length_grapheme(text) AS total_grapheme FROM (SELECT * FROM example_strings WHERE text IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT id, length_grapheme(CONCAT(text, ' additional text')) AS new_grapheme_count FROM example_strings;
SELECT id, length_grapheme(text) FROM example_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM additional_data);
SELECT AVG(length_grapheme(text)) AS avg_grapheme FROM example_strings;
SELECT SUM(length_grapheme(text)) AS total_grapheme FROM example_strings WHERE length_grapheme(text) < 5;
SELECT id, length_grapheme(text) AS grapheme_count, COALESCE(text, 'No text') AS safe_text FROM example_strings;
